# Francisco Moreno — Senior Web UI Engineer

> Angular specialist based in Houston, TX. 6 years building production-grade frontends for Disney, Royal Caribbean, United Airlines, and more. Available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities in the US.

## About

Francisco Moreno is a Senior Web UI Engineer with expertise in Angular, TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Astro. He has delivered enterprise-grade frontends at Globant for Fortune 500 companies including Disney, Royal Caribbean, United Airlines, Dick's Sporting Goods, and Gannett. Currently based in Houston, TX, originally from Monterrey, Mexico.

## Skills & Expertise

- Angular (specialist), TypeScript, RxJS, Angular Signals
- React, Next.js, Astro
- Frontend architecture: Clean Architecture, Atomic Design, Hexagonal Architecture
- Performance optimization, Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse 100
- Tailwind CSS, SCSS, CSS-in-JS
- Testing: Jest, Cypress, Playwright
- AI-assisted development: Claude Code, SDD workflow, MCP servers

## Work Experience

- **Globant** (5 years) — Senior Web UI Engineer. Clients: Disney, Royal Caribbean, United Airlines, Dick's Sporting Goods, Gannett
- **Freelance & Independent**: Vaneybr Portfolio (Angular), Kindnest (community platform, WIP), Contractors Project (AI-assisted client management, WIP), Shelfie (AI SaaS for product photography)

## Blog

Technical writing on Angular, JavaScript, frontend architecture, and AI-assisted development.

- /blog/angular-signals — Angular Signals: A Practical Introduction
- /blog/values-vs-references-in-javascript — Values vs References in JavaScript
- /blog/wtf-is-inmutability-in-js — WTF Is Immutability in JavaScript?
